economic_notes: Under receivership administration since August 8, 2019 for all SAC-funded programs. GBEs include Résidence au Soleil Levant (long-term care facility) and Traiteur W (catering). Carrefour Wôlinak inc. fully consolidated. Online casino (Pale interactive) and fitness centre also operated.
notes: Qualified audit opinion: two GBEs (9101-2658 Québec inc. / Résidence au Soleil Levant and 9323-8996 Québec inc. / Traiteur W) were accounted for using modified equity method rather than consolidated as required by PSAS. Council was under receivership administration by SAC since August 8, 2019. Restricted cash includes CMHC replacement reserve ($182,308), Ottawa trust fund ($11,718), and reserved investments/obligations ($3,000,000). ISC and Health Canada funding amounts not separately broken out in available text. Departmental expense figures taken from consolidated summary by department. Salaries not separately totalled in available text.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
